scenes.text:
A zero day is a day where
you did absolutely nothing toward your goals.

The concept is simple. Never have a zero day. Even on your worst day, do something. Read one page. Do ten pushups. Write one paragraph. Send
one email. It does not matter how small. What matters is that the chain never breaks. Consistency is not about intensity. It is about never stopping.

There will be days when life hits hard. When you are exhausted, heartbroken, defeated. Those are the days that matter
most. Not for the output, but for the identity. On those days, you prove to yourself who you really are.

Never zero. Even one percent
is infinitely more than nothing.

Promise yourself no more zero
days. Follow for daily accountability.
